creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
ChangeLog:

- Danger_mode for automatic Response.raise_for_status()
- Response.iter_lines refator
- Verify ssl is default.
- iter_lines last-line truncation fix
- Force safe_mode for async requests
- Handle safe_mode exceptions more consistently
- Fix iteration on null responses in safe_mode

Note to commiter, now this port dependants of net/urllib3 (PR163972), like external library (before, it was installed with py-requests). We should add an entry in UPDATE file to inform users. They must delete previous version of www/py-requests, and then add new one.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
